reviews.review_msg: She tells you exactly what she expects from you, ie. points you should make in your essays, things you should avoid, etc.  Great prof, makes the material enjoyable even for someone who doesn't major in the Humanities.  I definitely improved as a writer.  Doesn't hurt that she is a BABE either!

The people who didn't do well are quite obviously idiots.  She is very helpful, and as long as you do the readings and have some semblance of a human brain (the neanderthals below don't count), you will be fine.  Dr. Forlini is intelligent and charming; I'd highly recommend her.

She is SOOO awesome. Very funny, love class discussion. Only class that I feel noticed by the prof. She is very smart and helpful. She cares about her students and is willing to help if you want/need it. STRONGLY SUGGEST. Great teacher, interesting class.

I attended the first lecture, then dropped her class as soon as I could. Nice person, but disorganized and assumes students have prior experience with class material. She couldn't figure out presentation dates, so students ended up charging for the paper like starving people for a piece of bread. Thought I was in a 3rd yr class - apparently not.

Lectures are not interesting, course material is poorly chosen, and you have no contact with her unless you're in a tutorial that is lead by her. This class has discouraged me from further pursuing english.
Not only is she is extremely engaging, she is crystal clear and makes you think about things in a new light.  If you have her for a prof., consider yourself lucky.

Wonderful person outside of the lecture theatre. Unfortunately, lectures are dry and irrelevant to the novels, assignments, and exam. She would bring up historic examples which were confusing and unnecessary, even the TA admitted that he was confused by her explanations from time to time! She does explain herself better in office hours though.
She has a hot passion for literature. She portrays the beauty of lierature herself.
If you are looking for that hot teacher, this ones for you!
